entries.source: Use this rule: after any AI explanation, close the loop with output from your own mind. Write the idea back. Solve a fresh version. Make a flashcard. Teach it to an imaginary younger student. Ask for a quiz. The more the session asks you to produce, the less likely you are to fool yourself.
entries.value: Gamitin ito rule: pagkatapos anumang AI paliwanag, close ang loop kasama ang output mula sa iyong own mind. Isulat ang ideya likod. Lutasin ang isang fresh version. Gumawa ng isang flashcard. Magturo ito sa isang imaginary younger estudyante. Humingi ng isang quiz. Ang mas marami ang session nagtatanong ikaw makabuo, ang mas kaunti malamang ikaw ay sa fool yourself.

entries.source: We honor Do Not Track signals and do not track, plant cookies, or use advertising when a Do Not Track browser mechanism is in place. Do Not Track is a preference you can set in your web browser to inform websites that you do not want to be tracked. You can enable or disable Do Not Track by visiting the Preferences or Settings page of your web browser. If you are under 18 years of age, reside in California, and have a registered account with a Service, you have the right to request removal of unwanted data that you publicly post on the Services. To request removal of such data, please contact us using the contact information provided below, and include the email address associated with your account and a statement that you reside in California. We will make sure the data is not publicly displayed on the Services, but please be aware that the data may not be completely or comprehensively removed from all our systems (e.g. backups, etc.).
entries.value: Tayo honor Gawin Hindi Track signals at gawin hindi track, halaman cookies, o Gamitin advertising kapag isang Gawin Hindi Track Tingnan angr mechanism ay sa place. Gawin Hindi Track ay isang preference ikaw Maaari bang set sa iyong web Tingnan angr sa inform websites na ikaw gawin hindi gusto sa maging tracked. Ikaw Maaari bang enable o disable Gawin Hindi Track ng visiting ang Preferences o Settings pahina ng iyong web Tingnan angr. Kung ikaw ay sa ilalim ng 18 years ng age, reside sa California, at mayroon isang registered account kasama ang isang Serbisyo, ikaw mayroon ang tama sa request removal ng unwanted data na ikaw publicly post sa ang Mga serbisyo. Sa request removal ng such data, please contact amin gamit ang contact impormasyon ibinigay below, at isama ang email address associated kasama ang iyong account at isang statement na ikaw reside sa California. Tayo magiging Gumawa ng sure ang data ay hindi publicly displayed sa ang Mga serbisyo, pero please maging aware na ang data may hindi maging completely o comprehensively removed mula sa lahat aming systems (e.g. backups, etc.).
